name: okta_sso_to_aws
description: Successful SSO into AWS IAM Identity Center via Okta.

validation.notes: Honeycomb flattens the Okta target array positionally (okta.target.N.displayName). The calculated field ORs the low-index target display names to reproduce the Panther deep_walk membership test. Extend indices, or switch EQUALS to CONTAINS, if the AWS app name is suffixed or lands at a higher index.

calculated_fields.name: sso_target_is_aws
calculated_fields.expression: OR(EQUALS($okta.target.0.displayName, "AWS IAM Identity Center"), EQUALS($okta.target.1.displayName, "AWS IAM Identity Center"), EQUALS($okta.target.2.displayName, "AWS IAM Identity Center"), EQUALS($okta.target.3.displayName, "AWS IAM Identity Center"))
